title: Static Model Capability Registry
content: Implement a centralized registry (e.g., in constants.ts or a new metadata file) that maps model ID patterns to specific capabilities: 'REASONING', 'THINKING_BUDGET', 'REASONING_EFFORT'. The ModelService enriches fetched models with these flags, and the AIService uses a generic 'buildRequest' method that constructs the body based on these flags rather than checking model names directly.

rationale.anomaly: Current detection logic is scattered and based on simple string prefixes (e.g., 'o1').
rationale.approach: Decouple model identification from capability determination to simplify AIService logic.
alternatives_rejected: Dynamic capability discovery (APIs don't consistently provide this metadata)
